description.ko: 유리를 통해 굴절되는 빛의 매혹적인 시각화로, 굴절의 물리학을 통해 백색광이 고유의 색상들로 섬세하게 분리되는 순간을 포착합니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing visualization of light bending through glass, capturing the delicate separation of white light into its constituent colors through the physics of refraction.

prompt: A beam of pure white light passing through a high-precision glass prism, splitting into a vibrant, ethereal rainbow spectrum. Soft caustic light patterns dancing on a minimalist white surface. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, macro photography, sharp focus on the refraction point, iridescent colors, dispersion of light.
